title: NO MORE TORCHES
description: a mod that makes it so you don't have to place a bunch of torches on the ground
body: ![CRAFTING RECIPE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac9fa9bf579be1159677b7589475fb62091d9324.png)no more torches is a mod that makes it so you don't have to place a bunch of torches on the ground you can just place the light block. if you want to destroy the light block all you have to do is put a block where it is.
